channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: How Nigerian Prince scams still work: a 2024 teardown of social engineering
item.description: Cut social engineering success rate from 12% to 0.8% with a 60-second pause, voice verification, and regional tweaks — no magic, just cognitive load engineering.

item.title: AWS bill halved — here’s how we did it
item.description: Cut AWS bill by 53% in six months with concrete steps, benchmarks, and automation — orphaned data, Savings Plans, Spot, and real dashboards included. Optimize your AWS bill today.

item.title: How async/await, destructuring & optional chaining cut bugs 42% in 6 weeks
item.description: Cut bug tickets 42% and FX-widget latency to 280ms using async/await, destructuring & optional chaining — plus the mistakes that nearly derailed the rollout

item.title: Debugging Mindset Finally Explained: Why 90% of Bugs Die in 3 Steps
item.description: Fixed a $1,200 silent failure in 20 minutes by asking 'what changed' instead of reading logs — here’s the exact debugging mindset that turns chaotic bugs into repeatable investigations with real code examples and failure scenarios.

item.title: You’re choosing the wrong mobile stack — here’s the proof
item.description: odule was 70% of the business logic, but th with You choosing mobile stack — build iOS and Android Studio to build Android.

item.title: Docker in production fails with 'container out of memory' — and how to fix it
item.description: Cut Docker OOM crashes by 95% in production with 256Mi memory limits, alpine images, and kernel upgrades — learn the exact fixes for 'container_linux.go:380: memory: unknown error after fork/exec' and how to prevent it from happening again.

item.title: From Idea to Launch: Building an MVP in 30 Days: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut From Idea to Launch: Building an MVP in 30 Days failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and…

item.title: Analytics lie when NULLs masquerade as zeros — here’s the proof
item.description: Reduce false alerts by 70% by stopping NULLs from turning into zeros in SQL and BI tools — see actual BigQuery, Spark, and Stripe failures we debugged and the fixes that worked.

item.title: Big Tech is a dead end for most engineers
item.description: Big Tech engineers quit for 'better culture' but end up debugging memory leaks in Rust for three customers. Here’s how 12 engineers I mentored chose wisely—and how to pick your next move with data, not hype.

item.title: Why ClickHouse pays 3× more than PostgreSQL in 2024
item.description: Discover how ClickHouse cut 250GB analytics latency from 842ms to 18ms and reduced cloud costs by 38% — the tech skill paying 3× more than PostgreSQL in 2024.

item.title: API latency: Cloudflare Workers vs Fastly Compute@Edge
item.description: Cut API latency under 10 ms globally with Cloudflare Workers vs Fastly Compute@Edge — real benchmarks, code samples, and the mistakes that cost us 12 % of state during cache evictions.

item.title: How Google’s SRE culture cut downtime by 90% — here’s the code
item.description: Cut downtime by 91% with Google’s SRE culture — error budgets, progressive rollouts, and GitOps code you can run today. Includes real benchmarks, 2 code examples, and failure modes nobody mentions.

item.title: How RAG cut our hallucination rate from 18% to 2%
item.description: Cut hallucination rate from 18% to 2% with Retrieval-Augmented Generation — versioned pipelines, open-source models, and the exact stack that worked in production.

item.title: The 11 best multi-modal AI models in 2024
item.description: Cut end-to-end latency from 47 seconds to 1.8 seconds with multi-modal AI models — compare 11 options for text, image, and audio processing, with real benchmarks and costs for 2024.

item.title: Why Your 2026 Smart Home Keeps Guessing Wrong (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut smart home AI failure rates by 75% with sensor drift fixes — occupancy prediction accuracy, persistent buffers, and federated learning under 10ms response time for users in Lagos, Nairobi, and Accra.

item.title: AI finally explained: use it to learn anything faster
item.description: Cut skill-learning time by 30–50% using AI as a personalized tutor — worked examples, 3 concrete benchmarks, and the prompts that actually work, not the ones that waste time.

item.title: Junior dev jobs are dead — here's the receipts
item.description: Junior dev jobs dead: hat’s a 0.057% acceptance rate. Even if ever. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Write blog posts 80% faster with AI that still sound human
item.description: Cut draft time by 80% and edit time by 77% with AI that still sounds human — comparison table, code samples, and a free CLI tool included. AI voice cloning for content creation without robotic tone.

item.title: Why Your FP Code Fails with Impure Functions (and how to fix it)
item.description: Reduce functional programming errors by 80% with async purity rules — avoid 12ms latency spikes and 15 errors/month. functional programming concepts in practical code with promise handling and array methods

item.title: What Silicon Valley Engineers Really Think About Big Tech
item.description: Cut incident-related outages by 70% with this 200-line tracker used by ex-Big Tech engineers — SQLite, FastAPI, Prometheus metrics, and the discipline rules they don’t teach you
